key_learnings.mac_solution: uEnv.txt ethaddr=02:00:00:00:00:0N changes Linux MAC (U-Boot patches FDT)
key_learnings.ip_solution: uEnv.txt boardargs adds ip= to kernel cmdline (BEFORE ramdisk init)
key_learnings.flash_without_reader: SSH + mount /dev/mmcblk0p1 + cat > uEnv.txt — NO card reader!
key_learnings.arp_dance: arp -d .10 between SSH sessions reaches different physical boards
key_learnings.mesh_loopback: 3 meshd on 127.0.0.1 tests full stack on 1 board

bottlenecks: B1-B10 documented in SOUL.md Article V
